summary: AI Risk Forecast Timeline - COMPLETE. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend: All RiskForecastTimeline component features verified. 6 time buckets display correctly with risk bars (green=LOW, amber=MEDIUM, red=HIGH). Suggested Actions panel appears for HIGH risk windows. Caching working (cached=true on second call).

issues: Console warning about recharts width/height (-1) - chart sizing issue when panel first loads, but charts render correctly after

TestRiskForecastEndpoint.test_forecast_contains_6_time_buckets: PASS - All 6 buckets: early_morning, morning, afternoon, evening, night, late_night

TestRiskForecastEndpoint.test_summary_contains_required_fields: PASS - Contains peak_risk_bucket, peak_risk_score, high_risk_count, medium_risk_count

TestRiskLevelClassification.test_risk_levels_are_valid: PASS - All levels are LOW, MEDIUM, or HIGH

TestForecastCaching.test_second_call_returns_cached: PASS - Second call within 15 min returns cached=true

TestRBAC.test_guardian_gets_403: PASS - Guardian role correctly gets 403 Forbidden

TestMultipleDevices.test_dev001_has_high_risk: PASS - DEV-001 forecast retrieved (4 HIGH risk windows)

TestBucketTimeRanges.test_bucket_time_ranges: PASS - All bucket time ranges match spec (Early Morning 6-9, Morning 9-12, etc.)

RiskForecastTimeline_component.risk_level_badges: PASS - MEDIUM and HIGH badges on buckets
RiskForecastTimeline_component.reason_text: PASS - Reason text below buckets (e.g., 'activity decline trend (100%); health decline pattern (100%); movement declining (132%/day); recent device offline')

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/ri: 200 OK - Returns forecast with 6 buckets, summary, caching

critical_code_review_comments: Backend forecast_engine.py implements weighted scoring: predictive(0.5) + twin(0.3) + trend(0.2)
Backend correctly classifies risk: LOW (<0.3), MEDIUM (0.3-0.6), HIGH (>=0.6)
Backend caching in risk_forecasts table with 15 min TTL working correctly
Backend RBAC enforced - only operator/admin roles can access forecast endpoint
Backend 404 correctly returned for non-existent device IDs
Frontend RiskForecastTimeline component placed correctly in device expansion panel
Frontend uses data-testid attributes for all key elements (risk-forecast-card, forecast-bucket-*, forecast-actions)
Frontend card border correctly changes color based on risk level (red for HIGH, amber for MEDIUM)
Frontend Suggested Actions panel only shows when HIGH risk windows present
Frontend reason text displays correctly below relevant buckets
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Risk Forecast Timeline fully tested. DEV-001 (ce4b5463-5a7e-46a5-8bbf-365dcfb3daeb) shows 4 HIGH risk windows (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Night at 70-85%). The RiskForecastTimeline component renders in device expansion panel on /operator/device-health page. Forecast is cached for 15 minutes (check risk_forecasts table). RBAC enforced - guardian role gets 403, unauthenticated gets 401.
